MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Worth for Deborah Seymour (Successor Trustee).

The Court is treating this matter as a Petition to Reform the Deed and to Correct Title of Trust Assets. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Ella Yip/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.
